meta.focus: Google Business Profile + Maps · two pins (Tustin HQ + Chino Hills) · profile completeness + site connection
meta.data_window: Local Dominator geo-grid scans Apr 3 – May 18 2026 (133-cell grids; per-pin windows) + GBP Manager + site crawl

tldr: Chino Hills is the story this quarter. The satellite — only 121 reviews — extended its Inland-Empire lead from 731 to 791 top-3 map cells between Apr 3 and May 3, holding #1 on every tracked query at an avg rank of 2.8 and a 1.65× margin over Allied Van Lines. Tustin HQ took an early-May dip and has been recovering since (76 → 133 top-3 cells, May 3 → May 18). Both profiles are well-stocked, but they are barely connected to the website: no LocalBusiness/MovingCompany schema anywhere, neither profile's phone number appears correctly on the site, the Chino Hills profile points at the homepage instead of its own /chino-hills/ page, and the site still calls itself "Maison Moving (Staging)". Repairing that profile↔site foundation is the single highest-leverage move for both pins.

headline.h2: Chino Hills extends its lead while a fragile profile↔site link still caps both pins
headline.lede: Chino Hills gained ~60 top-3 map cells in April–May and tightened its grip on the Inland Empire against Allied Van Lines, Berger Allied and 2Man Moving. Tustin has begun bouncing back from an early-May dip. The GBPs themselves are reasonably complete, but the connective tissue to the site — schema, NAP, the Chino Hills landing target — is missing, which caps how high either pin can climb.

tiles.label: Chino Hills · Maps
tiles.sub: +60 top-3 cells Apr 3 → May 3 (731 → 791) · avg rank 2.8 · 121 reviews

tiles.label: Tustin HQ · Maps
tiles.sub: Recovering: +57 top-3 cells May 3 → May 18 (76 → 133) · avg rank 8.8 · 856 reviews

tustin.label: Tustin (HQ)
tustin.note: Hyper-competitive Orange County market. After an early-May dip, Maison's top-3 coverage has been recovering (76 → 133 cells, May 3 → May 18). Pro Movers leads the May 18 leaderboard at 193 top-3 cells.

chinohills.label: Chino Hills
chinohills.address: 15271 Fairfield Ranch Rd Ste 160, Chino Hills, CA 91709
chinohills.note: Less-saturated Inland-Empire field (top rivals are national van-line agents — Allied, Berger Allied). Maison added 60 top-3 cells between Apr 3 and May 3 and now leads at a 1.65× margin over Allied. Reviews are rising and the rating is climbing.

gbp_completeness.intro: Both profiles are reasonably well-built — rich service lists, product tiles, social links and active (if infrequent) posting. The gaps are in consistency between the two pins, review momentum at the HQ, and a handful of fields one profile fills and the other leaves blank.

chino.t: "Removals Service" — different label than Tustin; neither is the optimal US "Mover". Unify.

tustin.t: Extensive (local, long-distance, commercial, packing, storage, specialty)
Generic; no founding year / differentiators stated

chino.t: None set — missing the options Tustin has
Uses old twitter.com vs Tustin's x.com — minor mismatch

connection.intro: This is the part of the brief that matters most: is the website connected to the profiles the right way? Today it largely isn't. The site and the two GBPs read like separate assets, which limits how much authority and trust flow between them — and quietly caps Maps ranking, especially at the Tustin pin that needs every edge.
connection.verdict: Weakly connected. The fixes are concrete, mostly one-time, and developer-side — which makes this the highest-ROI workstream in the engagement.

rows.detail: Only an Organization object — named "Maison Moving (Staging)" — plus WebSite/Article. No address, phone, geo, sameAs, areaServed or aggregateRating in structured data on the homepage, /tustin/ or /chino-hills/.
rows.fix: Deploy MovingCompany + one LocalBusiness object per location with correct NAP, geo-coordinates, areaServed, sameAs to both Google Maps listings + all socials, and aggregateRating.

rows.issue: Site phone numbers don't match either GBP
rows.detail: Contact page shows 714-832-5950 for Tustin (GBP primary is 714-942-1061) and 909-970-3518 for Chino Hills (GBP primary is 909-552-7228). Neither GBP number appears on the site.
rows.fix: Reconcile to the GBP primaries; use one canonical local number per location everywhere (site, schema, citations).

rows.issue: Footer NAP shows Chino Hills only
rows.detail: Sitewide footer lists just the Chino Hills address with a toll-free number; the Tustin HQ is absent from the footer.
rows.fix: Show both locations (name, address, local phone, hours) in the footer and on a /locations hub.

rows.issue: Chino Hills GBP lands on the homepage, not /chino-hills/
rows.detail: A unique, city-specific /chino-hills/ page already exists, but the profile sends clicks to maisonmoving.com/?utm…chinohills instead.
rows.fix: Repoint the Chino Hills GBP website link to /chino-hills/ once that page carries the local phone, map embed and service links.

rows.issue: Location pages have no map, no local phone, and are typed as blog articles
rows.detail: /tustin/ and /chino-hills/ are unique pages but use og:type=article + BlogPosting schema, embed no Google Map (the only map embeds sitewide are on the contact page), and don't link in-body to the service pages.
rows.fix: Re-type them as service/location pages, embed the correct pin, add the local phone + FAQ schema + in-body links to /localmoving/, /office-movers/, /storage/ etc.

rows.detail: og:site_name and the schema Organization/WebSite name are both "Maison Moving (Staging)" on every page — the name Google reads in structured data.
rows.fix: Set the production WordPress site title + og:site_name + schema name to "Maison Moving & Storage".
Pick one canonical landing page per city; consolidate or 301 the weaker duplicate.

rows.detail: The footer Google-reviews link is hardcoded to a Serbian locale (gl=rs / hl=en-RS) and points only at the Tustin listing.
rows.fix: Drop the locale params; add a Chino Hills review link.

rows.issue: Malformed tel: links & exposed agency email
rows.detail: Footer uses tel:%20800-832-5950 / tel:+800-832-5950 (non-dialable); page author/byline is info@hqdm.io with an /author/infohqdm-io/ archive.
rows.fix: Clean tel: hrefs to E.164; set author to the brand.

rows.detail: Footer shows CPUC "CAL MTR# 0190726" (good). No USDOT number found anywhere.
rows.fix: Keep the CPUC number on-site + in schema; add USDOT/MC if they run interstate.

levers.title: Wire the website to the two profiles (schema + NAP)
levers.summary: Nothing else in Maps compounds until the site actually identifies its two locations to Google. Deploy MovingCompany + per-location LocalBusiness schema with correct NAP, geo, sameAs to both GBPs and socials, and aggregateRating; correct the site phone numbers to the GBP primaries; surface both addresses; and retire the "(Staging)" site name. Almost entirely one-time developer work.

levers.title: Repoint & upgrade the location landing pages
levers.summary: Point the Chino Hills GBP at /chino-hills/ (not the homepage), and make both /tustin/ and /chino-hills/ proper location pages: correct map embed, local phone, FAQ schema, and in-body links to the service pages. Resolve the /serving-all-of-…/ duplicates so each city has one clear page.

levers.title: Reverse the Tustin slide
levers.summary: Tustin is recovering from an early-May dip (76 → 133 top-3 cells May 3 → May 18) but its review count hasn't moved while rivals with 1,000–1,500 reviews keep climbing. Unify the primary category to Mover, fill service options + attributes, lift the photo set, post 1–2×/week, and stand up a review-acquisition workflow to restart velocity and nudge the 4.6 upward.

levers.title: Extend the Chino Hills lead
levers.summary: Defend #1: keep the review cadence climbing past 121, set the service options the profile is missing, and build out Inland-Empire service-area coverage (Eastvale, Ontario, Rancho Cucamonga, Diamond Bar). Monitor the fast risers — Allied Van Lines (+94), Amigos Moving (+72) and 2Man Moving (+61) all added top-3 cells Apr 3 → May 3.

levers.title: Unify NAP, categories & citations across both pins
levers.summary: Align primary category, name, hours and — once the owner confirms it — the founding year across both profiles, the site, and the citation set (BBB, Yelp, chamber). Consistency across the two pins is itself a ranking and trust signal.

tasks.title: Deploy MovingCompany + per-location LocalBusiness schema (NAP, geo, areaServed, sameAs → both GBP Maps URLs + socials, aggregateRating)
Correct site phone numbers to GBP primaries (Tustin 714-942-1061, Chino Hills 909-552-7228); fix malformed tel: hrefs
Show both locations' NAP in footer + a /locations hub (footer currently Chino-Hills-only)
Replace 'Maison Moving (Staging)' in WP site title, og:site_name and schema name
Fix Google review links (drop gl=rs locale; add Chino Hills review link); reset author off info@hqdm.io
Surface CPUC CAL MTR# 0190726 in schema; add USDOT/MC if interstate
Configure GA4 lead events as conversions (form_submit, click_phone_number, gmb_click, click_email) — only 4 native conversions tracked ever; leads invisible in GA4 today
Repoint Chino Hills GBP website link to /chino-hills/
Embed the correct Google Map pin on /tustin/ and /chino-hills/
Add local phone + in-body links to service pages on /tustin/ and /chino-hills/
Re-type /tustin/ + /chino-hills/ from blog Article to service/location pages (og:type + schema)
Resolve /serving-all-of-*-ca/ vs /tustin/ + /chino-hills/ duplication — choose canonical, consolidate/301
Unify Tustin primary category to 'Mover'; set all service options + attributes
Stand up review-acquisition workflow at Tustin (post-job SMS/email ask) to restart velocity + lift 4.6
Lift Tustin photo set past 36 (crews, trucks, facility, jobs); move posting to 1–2/week
Seed Tustin Q&A with top intent questions; respond to all recent reviews
Weekly LD monitoring of Tustin grid + new entrants (CC Relocation, Costa Mesa Moving, MoverTron)
Set Chino Hills service options (online estimates, on-site services) to match Tustin
Sustain Chino Hills review cadence past 121; add photos + Q&A
Build Inland-Empire service-area depth (Eastvale, Ontario, Rancho Cucamonga, Diamond Bar) on /chino-hills/ + GBP service areas
Monitor rising challengers (Berger Allied, Two Men and a Truck, Nelson Westerberg)
Align primary category + name + hours across both profiles
Confirm + unify founding year (1984 / 1992 / 1996) across site, GBP, citations
Citation sync (BBB, Yelp, YellowPages, chamber) to matched NAP for both pins

kpi_targets.metric: Chino Hills — top-3 map cells (8 queries)

owner_asks.q: GBP manager access for both profiles.
owner_asks.why: Most of the highest-leverage work (schema-linked NAP, service options, posts, photos, Q&A, service areas) needs write access to both the Tustin and Chino Hills listings.

owner_asks.q: What is the correct public phone number for each location?
owner_asks.why: The website shows numbers that match neither GBP (714-832-5950 vs 714-942-1061 at Tustin; 909-970-3518 vs 909-552-7228 at Chino Hills). We need the real dispatch line per location before we unify NAP everywhere.

owner_asks.q: What founding year should we use — 1984, 1992 or 1996?
owner_asks.why: The tagline says 1984, the Tustin profile says 1992, and Chino Hills says 1996. One consistent year strengthens the 'about', the schema and every citation.

owner_asks.q: What does review-acquisition look like today, especially at Tustin?
owner_asks.why: The HQ's review count has been flat (856 → 856) while competitors with 1,000–1,530 reviews keep gaining. Restarting velocity is the surest way to defend and recover the Tustin pin.

owner_asks.q: Are there any other Google Business Profiles or planned locations we should fold in?
owner_asks.why: We now manage two pins; if more exist (or are coming), we want them on the same schema, NAP, review and posting cadence from day one.

deliverables.name: Strategic Dashboard
deliverables.desc: Complete analyst view — both GBP audits, the site-connection audit, both Maps heatmaps, competitor leaderboards, levers, the full task list, KPI targets and owner asks.

deliverables.name: Condensed Strategy
deliverables.desc: The findings and the 90-day plan on one page — for packaging into client communication.

deliverables.name: Client Report
deliverables.desc: Plain-English report: what we found across the two profiles, how the Maps look, and what we'll do next.
